title: CEO ASSISTANT
description:
Job Responsibilities

1)     Act as a core support to the CEO, assisting with daily work mattersand business-related follow-ups;

2)     Liaise and coordinate with financial institutions and third-partyprofessional service providers (including banks, brokers, custodians, andother service firms) to support the execution of related matters;

3)     Attend and follow up on all key meetings of the CEO,including meeting preparation, note-taking, action-item tracking, and executionfollow-ups;

4)     Assist the CEO in coordinating with partners related to eachasset portfolio, and follow up on collaboration progress and relatedmatters;

5)     Support cross-team and cross-institution communication andcoordination within the scope authorized by the CEO;

6)     Handle ad hoc and special tasks assigned by the CEO.

7) Responsible for managing relationships with China‑based suppliers and customers, and for coordinating with internal teams in China to ensure alignment on business objectives.

Job Requirements

Mandatory Requirements

1)     Strong sense of responsibility: Highlyresponsible, detail-oriented, and accountable for work outcomes;

2)     Execution & efficiency: Strongexecution capability and efficiency, able to deliver high-quality resultswithin set timelines;

3)     Flexibility: Able to provide necessarysupport outside regular working hours when required;

4)     Professional ethics: High level ofprofessional integrity, capable of handling sensitive company andentity-related information appropriately;

5)     High time flexibility: Able to adapt tonon-fixed working hours.

Note: This position is not suitable for candidates seeking fixed working hours.

Preferred Qualifications

1)     Relevant experience: More than 3years of experience in liaising with financial institutions, investment,asset management, or related third-party service providers; prior experience asa CEO / Founder / Senior Executive Assistant is a strong plus;

2)     Relevant knowledge: Background orexposure to finance, accounting, or legal-related fields is a plus.

3)     Language skills: Strong Englishcommunication skills, able to participate in English meetings, especially those involving U.S. time zones;

4)     Work methodology: Logical and structuredworking style, with strong task decomposition and execution capability;

5)     Communication skills: Strongcommunication skills, able to efficiently relay information between the CEO and multiple stakeholders;

Learning & problem-solving ability

: Strong ability to work independently and resolve issues; work capability and efficiency are core evaluationcriteria for this role.

Compensation & Benefits

  • Monthly salary: SGD 7,000 - 10,000, subject to experience and overall capability;
  • Compensation and incentive structure will be discussed further during the interview process;
  • Performance-based bonus ranging from 3 to 8 months’ salary, subject to individual and company performance.

Additional Information

  • This position is limited to 1 hire, selection will be based on merit;
  • Working hours are relatively flexible and require alignment with U.S. time zone meetings;
  • This role is best suited for candidates with strong stress tolerance, high execution capability, and a desire to work closely with core business operations;
  • This is a high-trust role with clear long-term development opportunities;

postedCompany.description:
We are the experts in steel sourcing and project management services for offshore, construction and marine customers.

Our comprehensive inventory and strong supply chain allow us to deliver to your projects anytime, anywhere.
